overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval fantasy town at night. The character moves from a town square with a fountain through cobblestone streets and along a cliffside path before entering a stone fortress tunnel. The scene features torch lighting, a crescent moon, and aurora-like lights in the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval town square with central fountain

events.description: leaving the open town square and entering narrower streets between timber buildings

agents.ego_description: walking around the fountain and observing the surroundings, moving toward the street exit

entered.detail: three-tiered circular stone fountain with flowing water illuminated by warm light
tall stone clock tower with lit windows and pointed roof
half-timbered medieval building with dark wooden beams
greenish glowing light streaks in the night sky above the town

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a medieval town square at night, centered around a large illuminated stone fountain. The camera circles the fountain while maintaining view of a tall stone tower in the background. Half-timbered buildings line the square, and green aurora-like lights are visible in the dark sky above.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cobblestone street between timber-framed buildings

agents.ego_description: walking through the town streets passing medieval timber and stone buildings

entered.detail: cylindrical stone tower with conical roof and small windows
hanging fabric banner with red emblem suspended between buildings
white plastered stone building with multiple windows and external staircase

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the open square into narrower cobblestone streets lined with half-timbered houses. A cylindrical stone tower dominates the view ahead, while yellow banners hang between buildings. The path leads toward a white stone building with external stairs visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliffside path with stone retaining wall

events.description: transitioning from enclosed town streets to open cliffside path with water view

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated cobblestone path overlooking the water, passing torch lamps

entered.detail: low stone wall with regularly spaced burning torches on pillars
dark body of water visible below the cliff edge
large leafy tree with overhanging branches above the path

segments.scene_description: The environment opens up to a cliffside path with a low stone wall on the left lined with burning torches. Below the wall, a dark body of water is visible. Large trees overhang the cobblestone path from the right, and the night sky with aurora lights becomes fully visible overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone fortress entrance tunnel with portcullis

events.description: entering the stone archway tunnel with wooden portcullis and gate

agents.ego_description: approaching the fortress entrance and walking through the stone archway tunnel

notable_agents.action: guard standing near wooden cart holding a burning torch

entered.detail: massive stone fortress wall with crenellations and arched entrance
bright crescent moon hanging in the night sky above the fortress
large arched stone tunnel entrance with wooden portcullis above
wooden cart with barrels parked near the fortress wall

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a massive stone fortress with a crescent moon visible above its towers. A guard stands near a wooden cart with barrels to the left of the entrance. The character walks through a large stone archway with a wooden portcullis, entering the warmly lit tunnel interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a medieval town at night, transitioning from an open public square into the enclosed depths of a stone fortress. It begins by circling an illuminated stone fountain in a square lined with half-timbered buildings, with green aurora lights shimmering in the dark sky above a distant tower. As the camera moves forward, the open space narrows into cobblestone streets decorated with yellow banners, leading the way toward a white stone building. The scene then opens up onto a cliffside path where burning torches line a low wall overlooking dark water, before the path curves under overhanging trees toward a massive fortress under a crescent moon. Finally, the camera passes a guard and a wooden cart to enter a large stone archway, shifting from the open night air into the warmly lit interior of a fortress tunnel.
